problem id: 86e91f7d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  00101000 -> 00000000
  00111101 -> 10000000
  10111100 -> 00000000
  11011010 -> 00000001
  01110001 -> 10000000
  01000101 -> 10000000
  01100110 -> 00000000
  11110110 -> 00000001
  11111001 -> 10000000

query: 11010010
predicted answer: 00000001
